landing.badge: Itegure neza ikizamini cyawe cy'imodoka mu Kinyarwanda
landing.title: Wige amategeko y'umuhanda, ushiremo imyitozo, utsinde ikizamini.
landing.description: Platforme yawe y'imyitozo n'icyizamini yubatse nka Duolingo, ariko ikibanda ku mategeko y'umuhanda n'ibyapa.
landing.practiceDesc: Menya ibyapa, amategeko y'umuhanda, n'imyitwarire mu gihe witegura ikizamini.

quickPractice.title: Imyitozo yihuse
quickPractice.description: 20 bibazo muri session, igisubizo cyihuse, nta gihe gitegetswe.

certifiedExam.title: Ikizamini cyemewe
certifiedExam.description: 20 min, nta feedback, ibyavuye bigatangwa neza kandi bikabikwa.

admin.title: Umuyobozi
admin.description: Umuyobozi ashobora gucunga banki y'ibibazo na raporo y'abakoresha.

auth.title: Injira cyangwa wiyandikishe
auth.subtitle: Hitamo uruhande rwawe
auth.description: Hitamo "Student" niba witeguye imyitozo n'ibizamini, cyangwa "Admin" niba uri kuyobora ibibazo n'icyimezo.

benefits.title: Inyunganizi
benefits.student: Student: tangira imyitozo, ukore ibizamini, urebe raporo.
benefits.admin: Admin: genzura banki y'ibibazo, uhindure ibibazo, urebe uko abakoresha bitwaye.

dashboard.description: Iyi ni dashboard yawe y'imyitozo n'ikizamini. Hitamo icyo ushaka gukora hanyuma ukomeze kwiga.
dashboard.examReadyText: Wakoze imyitozo 5. Witeguye gukora ikizamini nyakuri!

resultsCard.title: Reba Ibyavuye
resultsCard.description: Urebe uko wagiye utsinda mu bizamini byawe.

results.title: Ibyavuye mu Kizamini
results.subtitle: Dore uko wagiye utsinda mu kizami cyawe cya nyuma
results.feedbackPassed: Akazi keza! Watsinze ikizamini. Komeza umurimo mwiza!
results.feedbackFailed: Ntugire impungenge! Reba ibisubizo byabuze hanyuma ugerageze nanone. Imyitozo ituma ukora neza.

exam.title: Exam Mode
exam.submitIncomplete: Washobora gusubira inyuma ugasubiza ibibazo utarasubije.

practice.title: Practice Mode
practice.subtitle: Gerageza ubumenyi bwawe n'ibibazo 20
practice.greatJob: Akazi keza! Tugana ku kibazo gikurikira...

review.title: Review Mode
review.subtitle: Reba ibisubizo bya nyuma by'ikizamini
review.noExams: Nta bizamini bya vuba byo gusuzuma. Tangira ikizamini cya mbere kugira ngo urebe ibisubizo.
